calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-10-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Kollin Fotheringham And Aurora Fotheringhams Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Leslie Guillon, Esq. 916-419-1111 Amerio Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Brian Leach, Esq. 415-775-4455 Leach & McGreevy for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - A R G U E D. Ms. Guillon contests sanctions. Mr. Leach responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2-DEFENDANT EMMA BAUGHMAN's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Kollin Fotheringham And Aurora Fotheringhams Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling, the motion to compel is DENIED as moot, sanctions are taken under submission.

Mr. Leach to submit a proposed order in word format that is verbatim with the Court's ruling, in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com by 12noon today.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

The Court adopts the tentative ruling, the motion to compel is DENIED as moot, sanctions are taken under submission.

Mr. Leach to submit a proposed order in word format that is verbatim with the Court's ruling, in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com by 12noon today.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
